SETTER GUIDE
Jurupa Valley · Riverside County
RIV
SETTER GUIDE
Jurupa Valley
Full Door Pitch · Jurupa Valley
Guión Completo · Jurupa Valley

THE PITCH

EL GUIÓN

01 Open Apertura
"Hey — you guys get a lot of people knocking out here?"
[They respond]
"Yeah — reason I'm stopping by is California flagged this area for high risk."
👤Step back from door. Relaxed, hands visible.
🎙️Friendly first line. Shift to calm and serious on "flagged."
"Hola — ¿les tocan la puerta seguido por aquí?"
[Responden]
"Sí — la razón por la que vengo es porque California marcó esta área como de alto riesgo."
👤Dar un paso atrás. Manos visibles. Relajado.
🎙️Amigable al inicio. Cambiar a serio en "marcó."
02 The Problem El Problema
"Governor Newsom has been pushing electric vehicles and it's pouring a massive strain on the grid — everyone in the area has been plugging in at night."
"Come August there are going to be mandatory grid shutdowns because there's not enough power to go around."
"They have to fix this."
🎙️Slow down on "mandatory grid shutdowns." Last line — declarative, no upward inflection.
👤Hold eye contact after the last line. Don't fill the silence.
"El Gobernador Newsom ha estado promoviendo los carros eléctricos y está causando una presión enorme en la red — todos están conectando sus carros por las noches."
"A partir de agosto van a haber apagones obligatorios porque no hay suficiente energía para todos."
"Tienen que arreglar esto."
🎙️Ir más despacio en "apagones obligatorios." Última línea: firme, no pregunta.
👤Mantener contacto visual. No llenar el silencio.
03 The Solution La Solución
"The way Edison is handling it is by installing battery backup systems on select homes in this area — enough panels to charge the battery and take the load off the grid."
"In return for helping with the grid — they significantly lower your utility cost."
🎙️Back to calm and conversational. Informing, not selling. Let "significantly" carry natural weight.
👤Natural hand gesture describing the battery system.
"La forma en que Edison lo está manejando es instalando sistemas de batería de respaldo en casas seleccionadas — suficientes paneles para cargar la batería y aliviar la red."
"A cambio de ayudar con la red — reducen significativamente su costo de servicio."
🎙️Regresar a tono calmado. Informar, no vender.
04 Qualify + Bill Calificar + Recibo
"They're strict on which homes they select though — you can't use too much or too little power or it won't make sense."
[Pause]
"What's your highest bill been? And your lowest?"
[They give a dollar amount]
"Is that for 3 months? Because that's not normal for this area."
"What we really need is the kilowatts you're using. Do you know how many kW you used last month?"
[They say no]
"Yeah — that's how they determine if this makes sense. The dollar amount doesn't tell the whole story, it's the usage."
"Do you usually get your Edison bill in the mail or online?"
[Either answer — pull out example bill]
"See this bar graph right here — this shows your kilowatt usage month by month. This is exactly what the program looks at."
[When they pull their actual bill — point to the charge]
"You see this charge right here — this is the public purpose program. This is something you've been paying into every single month. This is literally the program we're talking about right now."
[Pause. Let them look at it.]
"This should work — I'm certain you can save money and this would make sense for your house, like it has for your neighbors we've helped out here."
[Pull back]
"It really just comes down to whether they can even select your home. They're just really selective with which homes they move forward with."
🎙️Genuine confusion on the dollar amount. First confirm — warm confidence. Pullback — slight shrug, like it's out of your hands.
👤Point to the public purpose charge specifically. Pause after — let them see their own bill. Small nod on confirm, slight shrug on pullback.
"Son estrictos con las casas que seleccionan — no pueden usar demasiada ni muy poca energía o no tendría sentido."
[Pausa]
"¿Cuánto ha sido su recibo más alto? ¿Y el más bajo?"
[Dan una cantidad en dólares]
"¿Eso es de 3 meses? Porque eso no es normal para esta área."
"Lo que realmente necesitamos son los kilovatios que están usando. ¿Saben cuántos kW usaron el mes pasado?"
[Dicen que no]
"Sí — así es como determinan si tiene sentido. La cantidad en dólares no cuenta toda la historia, es el consumo."
"¿Generalmente reciben su recibo de Edison por correo o en línea?"
[Mostrar el recibo de ejemplo]
"¿Ven esta gráfica de barras? Muestra el consumo de kilovatios mes a mes. Esto es exactamente lo que el programa analiza."
[Cuando saquen su recibo real — señalar el cargo]
"¿Ven este cargo aquí? Este es el programa de propósito público. Es algo en lo que han estado pagando cada mes. Literalmente es el programa del que estamos hablando ahora mismo."
[Pausa. Déjenlos ver.]
"Esto debería funcionar — estoy seguro de que pueden ahorrar dinero, como lo ha hecho para sus vecinos aquí."
[Retroceder]
"Realmente depende de si pueden seleccionar su casa. Son muy selectivos con las casas con las que avanzan."
05 Set the Appointment Fijar la Cita
"The engineers for the program come out, assess if the home is a good fit, and let you know if it ultimately makes sense. They're not there to sell you anything — just to verify eligibility."
"If they came out and your home qualified — backup battery, enough panels to charge it, zero cost, and it significantly lowers your utility cost — is that worth 45 minutes to find out?"
[They say yes]
"The engineers are really busy with appointments in Jurupa Valley right now — they just need a good time to come by and see if this is even a good fit for your home. Do afternoons or evenings typically work better for you and your spouse?"
[They answer]
"Perfect — does [day] at [time] work?"
🎙️Value check — genuine curiosity, slight upward inflection on "find out." Lock the time — asking WHEN not IF.
👤Lean in slightly on value check. Phone or notepad out before asking for time.
"Los ingenieros del programa vienen, evalúan si la casa es adecuada y les dicen si tiene sentido. No vienen a venderles nada — solo a verificar si califican."
"Si vinieran y su casa calificara — batería de respaldo, paneles para cargarla, sin costo, y reduce significativamente su costo de servicio — ¿valdría 45 minutos para averiguarlo?"
[Dicen que sí]
"Los ingenieros están muy ocupados con citas en Jurupa Valley ahora mismo — ¿generalmente les funcionan mejor las tardes o las noches a usted y su esposo/a?"
[Responden]
"Perfecto — ¿les funciona el [día] a las [hora]?"
06 Work Order + Tie Down Orden + Tie Down
"Let me get the work order started — what's the best email? Everything is digital so they'll send everything over that way."
[Get email, then…]
"And your best number — just in case the engineer gets overbooked and is running a little behind."
[Close notepad. Step back. Genuine tone.]
"Alright — you're all set for [day] at [time]."
"The engineer will give you their honest assessment. If it makes sense they'll tell you. If it doesn't — they'll tell you that too."
"But if everything checks out and your home is a good fit — is there any reason you wouldn't want to move forward with the program?"
[Handle any concern now. Then walk.]
"It was really nice meeting you — I genuinely hope your home is able to qualify."
[They say "me too" or "I hope so"]
"Based on what I saw I think you have a really good shot — that's why I wanted to make sure we got someone out there."
[Smile. Walk. Don't look back.]
🎙️"Just in case" on the number — courtesy, not a confirmation call. Pullback is warm and sincere. Let them have the last word.
👤Close notepad before tie down. Turn to walk before the pullback. Every word after this is a liability.
"Déjenme iniciar la orden de trabajo — ¿cuál es el mejor correo? Todo es digital, les enviarán todo por ese medio."
[Obtener correo, luego…]
"¿Y su mejor número? Por si acaso el ingeniero tiene demasiadas citas y se retrasa un poco."
[Cerrar libreta. Dar un paso atrás.]
"Listo — quedan agendados para el [día] a las [hora]."
"El ingeniero les dará su evaluación honesta. Si tiene sentido se los dirá. Si no, también se los dirá."
"Pero si todo sale bien y su casa es adecuada — ¿hay alguna razón por la que no quisieran seguir adelante con el programa?"
[Manejar cualquier preocupación. Luego caminar.]
"Fue un placer conocerlos — de verdad espero que su casa pueda calificar."
[Dicen "nosotros también"]
"Basándome en lo que vi, creo que tienen muy buenas posibilidades — por eso quise asegurarme de que viniera alguien."
[Sonreír. Caminar. No mirar atrás.]

THE PITCH GETS THEM CURIOUS · THE BILL MAKES IT REAL · THE PULLBACK MAKES THE APPOINTMENT STICK

EL GUIÓN GENERA CURIOSIDAD · EL RECIBO LO HACE REAL · EL RETROCESO SOLIDIFICA LA CITA

AVCE Power Choice Program — show homeowner the highlighted section when discussing what's already on their bill. Programa AVCE Power Choice — mostrar la sección resaltada al hablar de lo que ya está en su recibo.
Riverside County Grid Notice — use this to show homeowners the official notice for their area. Aviso de Red del Condado de Riverside — usar para mostrar el aviso oficial del área.
↗
⚡ SCE Public Safety Power Shutoffs
⚡ Apagones de Seguridad Pública SCE
sce.com → Outage Types → PSPS
Official SCE page for scheduled and emergency shutoffs in Southern California.
Página oficial de SCE para apagones programados en el sur de California.
At the door: En la puerta: If a homeowner pushes back on grid shutdowns, open this page and show them SCE's own website. Let the source do the talking. Si el propietario cuestiona los apagones, mostrar el propio sitio de SCE. Dejar que la fuente hable.
SCE Legal Notice — filed rate increases through 2031. Rates go up every year regardless. Locking in lower utility cost now matters. Aviso Legal SCE — aumentos de tarifa hasta 2031. Las tarifas suben cada año. Por eso es importante actuar ahora.
↗
📄 SCE — Get a Copy of Your Bill
📄 SCE — Copia de su Recibo
sce.com → Help Center → Copy of Bill
Pull up a homeowner's official Edison bill right at the door to see their actual kWh usage.
Obtener el recibo oficial de Edison del propietario en la puerta para ver su consumo real en kWh.
At the door: En la puerta: "Do you have your Edison bill handy? No worries — let's pull it up right here." Walk them to the bar graph and point out the public purpose program charge. "¿Tiene su recibo a la mano? No hay problema — lo buscamos aquí." Dirigirlos a la gráfica de barras y señalar el cargo del programa de propósito público.
Objection
"We already have solar."
"Perfect — that actually might make you even more valuable to the program. The battery side is separate from your panels. What system do you have?"
Objection
"I'm not interested in solar."
"I hear you — this isn't about buying solar. This is Edison installing battery backup on your home as part of a grid relief program. You're not buying anything — they're coming to check if your home even qualifies."
Objection
"How much does it cost?"
Buying sign disguised as an objection.
"Zero cost to you. No loan, no lien on the home. Edison funds it through the grid program. That's why they're selective — not every home makes the cut."
Objection
"We rent / the landlord owns it."
"Got it — do you know if the landlord lives nearby? The program works for rental properties too, we'd just need to connect with whoever handles the property decisions."
Objection
"I need to talk to my spouse."
Handle at the door — not after.
"Totally — is your spouse home right now? The engineer needs both of you there for the 45 minutes anyway. Better to get a time that works for both of you."
Objection
"We've heard this before / it's a scam."
"I completely understand — there's been a lot of noise out here. [Show the slick or notice.] This is an authorized SCE document. The engineer doesn't sell you anything — they assess and tell you if it makes sense. If it doesn't, they'll say that too."
Objeción
"Ya tenemos paneles solares."
"Perfecto — eso en realidad podría hacer que su casa sea aún más valiosa para el programa. La batería es separada de sus paneles. ¿Qué sistema tienen?"
Objeción
"No me interesa el solar."
"Le entiendo — esto no es comprar solar. Edison está instalando baterías de respaldo como parte de un programa de alivio a la red. No van a comprar nada — vienen a verificar si su casa califica."
Objeción
"¿Cuánto cuesta?"
"Costo cero para usted. Sin préstamo, sin gravamen. Edison lo financia a través del programa de la red. Por eso son selectivos — no toda casa califica."
Objeción
"Necesito hablar con mi esposo/a."
"Claro — ¿está su esposo/a en casa ahora? El ingeniero de todas formas necesita que ambos estén presentes para los 45 minutos. Mejor conseguir un horario que les funcione a los dos."
Smoke screens ≠ real objections. These are deflections — the homeowner hasn't said no. Acknowledge and redirect back to the pitch.
Las pantallas de humo ≠ objeciones reales. Son evasivas. Reconocer y redirigir al guión.
Smoke Screen
"I'm busy right now."
"Totally — this is only going to take 60 seconds. I just need to check two numbers on your bill to see if your home is even in the window."
Smoke Screen
"Just leave me some information."
"I would but what I really need is just your highest and lowest bill — that tells me in 10 seconds whether this even makes sense for your home. What's your highest been?"
Smoke Screen
"We're not interested."
Said before they know what it is.
"I get that — most people say that before they hear what it actually is. This isn't a solar pitch. California flagged this area for grid risk and Edison is fixing it by putting battery backup on select homes. Zero cost to you. Worth 60 seconds to hear if your home qualifies."
Smoke Screen
"We already looked into it."
"What did they offer you? Because what we're doing is specifically through the SGIP grid program — battery backup funded by Edison, not a purchase or a loan. Might be completely different from what you saw."
Pantalla de Humo
"Estoy ocupado/a ahorita."
"Claro — esto solo toma 60 segundos. Solo necesito verificar dos números en su recibo para saber si su casa está en el rango."
Pantalla de Humo
"Déjeme información nada más."
"Lo haría pero lo que necesito es solo su recibo más alto y más bajo — eso me dice en 10 segundos si esto tiene sentido para su casa. ¿Cuál ha sido el más alto?"
Pantalla de Humo
"No nos interesa."
"Lo entiendo — la mayoría lo dice antes de escuchar de qué se trata. No es una venta de solar. California marcó esta área por riesgo en la red y Edison lo está arreglando instalando baterías en casas seleccionadas. Sin costo. Vale 60 segundos escuchar si su casa califica."
When you see these — slow down. The homeowner is interested. Don't speed up and oversell. Answer directly and move to the next step.
Cuando veas estas señales — ve más despacio. El propietario está interesado. No sobrevendas. Responde y avanza al siguiente paso.
Buying Sign
"How much does it cost?"
"Zero cost." Then move directly to pulling the bill. Don't over-explain.
Buying Sign
"My neighbor has one of those."
"Exactly — that's part of what we're doing in this area right now. Let me check if your home is in the same window they were." Pull the bill.
Buying Sign
"Do you think we'd qualify?"
"Based on what you described I think you have a really good shot — that's exactly why I want to get an engineer out there to verify." Lock the time.
Buying Sign
They go get their bill without being asked.
Strong signal. Let them bring it. When they hand it to you — slow down, study it, point to the bar graph and the public purpose program charge. Build value before you move to the set.
Buying Sign
They call their spouse to the door.
Don't restart the pitch. Brief one-sentence recap and keep moving. Both decision makers present — you just got it without asking.
Señal de Compra
"¿Cuánto cuesta?"
"Costo cero." Luego pasar directamente a pedir el recibo. No sobreexpliques.
Señal de Compra
"Mi vecino tiene uno de esos."
"Exacto — eso es parte de lo que estamos haciendo en esta área ahora. Déjenme verificar si su casa está en el mismo rango." Pedir el recibo.
Señal de Compra
Traen su recibo sin que se los pidas.
Señal fuerte. Deja que lo traigan. Estúdialo, señala la gráfica de barras y el cargo del programa de propósito público. Construir valor antes de fijar la cita.
